code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_GradeSync] --> New
    state New {Education_GradeSync] --> Incomplete
        Incomplete --> DataComplete : FormSubmission
    }
    New --> InReview
    state InReview {Education_ContentCDN] --> AwaitingLegalReview
        AwaitingLegalReview --> AwaitingResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingResponse --> AwaitingLegalReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingLegalReview --> OutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_if_state <<choice>>
        OutcomeProvided --> legal_if_state
        legal_if_state --> LegalApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_if_state --> LegalRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        LegalApproved --> [Education_LMS_Portal]
        LegalRejected --> [Education_ContentCDN]
        --
        [Education_ContentCDN] --> AwaitingIPScan
        AwaitingIPScan --> IpScanComplete
        state ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpScanComplete --> ip_if_state
        ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if ScanOutcome == no_findings
        ip_if_state --> AwaitingIpReview: if ScanOutcome == inconclusive
        ip_if_state --> IpRejected: if ScanOutcome == findings
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIpResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingIpResponse --> AwaitingIpReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingIpReview --> IpOutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpOutcomeProvided --> legal_ip_if_state
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpApproved --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> [Education_StudentDB]
        IpApproved --> [Education_GradeSync]
        --
        [Education_GradeSync] --> AwaitingSecurityScan
        AwaitingSecurityScan --> SecurityScanComplete
        state security_if_state <<choice>>
        SecurityScanComplete --> security_if_state
        security_if_state --> SecurityApproved: if no_findings
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if inconclusive
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if security findings
        SecurityApproved --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityRejected --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityApproved --> [Education_ClassroomService]
        SecurityRejected --> [Education_GradeSync]
    }
    state inreview_if_state <<choice>>
    InReview --> inreview_if_state
    inreview_if_state --> Rejected: One or more check failed
    inreview_if_state --> Approved: All checks pass
    Approved --> NonCompliant: Periodic IP or security scan raises noncompliance
    NonCompliant --> Retired: Noncompliance not mitigated
    NonCompliant --> Approved: Compliance issue resolved
    Approved --> Retired: Repository no longer required
    Rejected --> [Education_StudentDB]
    Retired --> [Education_ContentCDN]
repo_description: A re-usable system for providing approvals and rejections, reusable in many projects.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育科技套件设计一个完整的合规审查状态机。核心场景是：GradeSync提交新组件后，必须经过法务、知识产权和安全三道审查关卡。我想把这三条审查线做成并行的子状态，最后汇总到统一的结果判断。
明白了，三条审查线并行在InReview复合状态内部。我注意到IP审查这块比较复杂——如果扫描结果不明确，需要额外的人工复核流程，这个复核还要再走一遍法务判断，对吗？另外，Dependencies modified这个回退条件是什么意思？
对，IP审查是最复杂的。AwaitingIpReview状态下，法务可能提出疑问进入AwaitingIpResponse，回复后再回到复核；也可能直接给出IpOutcomeProvided，然后分流到批准或拒绝。Dependencies modified是指如果依赖项有变更，无论当前在复核、拒绝还是批准状态，都要回到AwaitingIPScan重新扫描。

好的，我先把InReview的三大分支搭起来。法务线：ContentCDN进入AwaitingLegalReview，可以往返AwaitingResponse，最终到OutcomeProvided，用choice节点分流到LegalApproved或LegalRejected。IP线：ContentCDN进入AwaitingIPScan，扫描完成后通过ip_if_state分流，无问题直接批准，有问题走复核流程，有发现则拒绝。
安全审查线相对简单，从GradeSync进入AwaitingSecurityScan，扫描完成后通过security_if_state判断。但这里有个细节：无论SecurityApproved还是SecurityRejected，只要发现Code updates identified，都要回到AwaitingSecurityScan重新扫描。
已添加安全审查分支。现在三条线都指向各自的外部系统：LegalApproved到LMS Portal，LegalRejected回到ContentCDN；IP批准回到GradeSync，拒绝到StudentDB；SecurityApproved到ClassroomService，拒绝回到GradeSync。接下来处理InReview的出口汇总？
是的，用inreview_if_state作为choice节点：任一分支失败就整体Rejected到StudentDB，全部通过则Approved。Approved之后还有生命周期管理——可能因定期扫描发现NonCompliant，若未缓解则Retired到ContentCDN，修复后可回到Approved；也可能直接因仓库不再需要而Retired。
我检查一下刚才的IP复核流程——发现漏了AwaitingIpReview到AwaitingIPScan的Dependencies modified回退边，以及IpRejected和IpApproved同样要有这条边。另外复核后的IpOutcomeProvided需要独立的legal_ip_if_state来判断结果，和主法务线的legal_if_state区分开。
修正正确。最后确认入口：GradeSync的New状态包含Incomplete和DataComplete，通过FormSubmission触发。DataComplete后进入InReview，开始三条并行审查线。
完成。整个状态机已覆盖：GradeSync入口、New子状态、InReview复合状态（含法务/IP/安全三线并行审查及各自的choice判断和回退机制）、最终汇总判断，以及Approved后的合规生命周期管理。
